title: Persistence Without Individuation: Reference Implementation
description: Reference computational implementation accompanying the paper 'Persistence Without Individuation: A Witness Model for Metric-Preserving Identity Underdetermination' (Thomas, 2026). Implements the two-oscillator Langevin witness substrate, the eight-item observable battery, and the eight invariance verification scripts of Appendix C. Numerical agreement with analytical results is verified at machine precision for exact-invariance observables and at characterized analytical bounds for near-invariance observables (PLV, Kuramoto). The implementation is positioned as independent verification of the paper's analytical results and as a substrate for downstream extensions, including candidate partition-warrants.
notes: When the accompanying paper is published, the paper DOI should be added as an additional related identifier with relation 'isSupplementTo' and resource_type 'publication-article'. The .zenodo.json file may be updated and a new GitHub release tagged to refresh the Zenodo deposit metadata.
